text:
Why BRCAAway may be away from present-day practice
Abi + Olaparib showed impressive OS (68 months) in BRCA/ATM mCRPC.
But small Phase 2, ARPI-naïve population, largely pre-triplet era.
Strong biology. Different era. Context matters.
